dimensions.name: Occasion Detection
dimensions.justification: Hijri Eid, order-inferred low/medium occasions, and Mom/Dad clustering are present with evidence; profile rows often miss recipient_relationship.
dimensions.would_improve: Attach order relationships to profile occasions and add March 8 order-pattern detection.

dimensions.name: Prompt Engineering
dimensions.justification: Structured prompts, safety filters, and clean email/WhatsApp copy; push path exists but no push sends in the schedule.
dimensions.would_improve: Schedule push when eligible and match catalogue SKUs to each occasion in LLM context.

dimensions.name: System Design
dimensions.justification: Modular pipeline, docker-compose one-shot, fatigue cap, consent checks, and channel routing all work end to end.
dimensions.would_improve: Replace browse-as-email proxy with real open events and a persistent send ledger.

dimensions.name: Send-Time Optimisation
dimensions.justification: Timezone mapping, segment cold-start, urgency caps, and quiet-hour avoidance are implemented in orchestration_engine.
dimensions.would_improve: Store explicit customer timezones and add automated local-time quiet-hour validation.

dimensions.name: Data Quality
dimensions.justification: 50 customers, 500 events, 100 SKUs, and three timezone bands meet scale; Feb/Dec occasion tags are only loosely aligned.
dimensions.would_improve: Tighten seasonal occasion_tags and add email_open plus country segment fields.

dimensions.name: Code & Infrastructure
dimensions.justification: docker-compose up runs pipeline and tests; all required outputs exist with 7/7 tests and ~81% coverage.
dimensions.would_improve: Add orchestration edge-case tests and a compose healthcheck for CI.

dimensions.name: Post-Mortem Quality
dimensions.justification: POST_MORTEM prioritises attribution, A/B loops, and honest limits tied to DESIGN_DECISIONS and README.
dimensions.would_improve: Add a self-score vs automated QA comparison table after a schedule validator ships.
